topic_title: Causal inference benchmarks for ML evaluation

top_findings.name: BiomedSciAI/causallib
top_findings.why_overlaps: GitHub repo 'BiomedSciAI/causallib' (813 stars) provides an implementation of 'causal inference'. Description: a python package for modular causal inference analysis and model evaluations.
top_findings.how_we_differ: Our proposed work focuses specifically on 'Causal inference benchmarks for ML evaluation'. Articulate a concrete contribution gap versus this existing work before promoting to GO (see §6 verification log).
